items.title: FIFA World Cup: Switzerland end Algeria's dream to storm into Round of 16
items.summary: Switzerland secured their spot in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 16 with a commanding 2-0 win over Algeria, thanks to goals from Breel Embolo and Dan Ndoye. This victory marks...

items.title: Shepherd and de Kock make the difference as MI New York defend 132 in Pomona
items.summary: Marcus Stoinis put on a strong all-round show, with 3 for 14 and 36 in 31 balls, but couldn't take Seattle Orcas over the line
